ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-14-2020 Continued To Aug-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on August 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why he has not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is also continued to that date. The Probate Examiner's notes must be cleared in a written response.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
